messages.message: The 'loadAll' function makes the dependencies of useCallback Hook (at line 105) change on every render. Move it inside the useCallback callback. Alternatively, wrap the definition of 'loadAll' in its own useCallback() Hook.

suggestions.desc: Wrap the definition of 'fetchProfile' in its own useCallback() Hook.

suppressedMessages.message: The ref value 'manualRescheduleRef.current' will likely have changed by the time this effect cleanup function runs. If this ref points to a node rendered by React, copy 'manualRescheduleRef.current' to a variable inside the effect, and use that variable in the cleanup function.
